title: Collectibles_KD
description: An assortment of items from different franchises that can be collected from random drops.
body:
Whilst travelling the Minecraft World you'll fight a lot of monsters, with this mod there is a chance these mobs can now drop one of the many collectibles added!

The items currently added are all in reference to another franchise, from Dragonballs to Millenium items, you too can now collect them all. With the new "Display Stand" block, you are able to show off your collection as well as any other item you have (warning, colliding with this block will destroy it and drop your item). 

With the config file, drops can be restricted, made rarer or more common allowing for those with a server to provide a way to reward minigames, adventure maps to provide a trackable loot item (without the need for resourcepacks) and to give players a small side quest to work on whilst playing and use as trade.

 

 

Feel free to report any issues or feedback in the comments below or by joining the discord. https://discord.gg/SeSzabP

Anyone is free to download and use the mod. No editing or redistributing except via curseforge modpacks that do not reupload is permitted. Any items in reference to other franchises are purely fan made and have no connection to the original IP holders.
